value.found_quote:
Route Agent Runtime traffic through Agent Gateway
Learn how to route Agent Runtime traffic through Agent Gateway for secure and governed connectivity.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "Agent Gateway" as a feature that routes Agent Runtime traffic through a gateway for "secure and governed connectivity," matching the claim almost verbatim. The page also notes at the top that "This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'," indicating it is in Preview status.
